name: Kyriba Treasury and Liquidity Management REST API
what_it_does: Kyriba treasury and liquidity management REST API for corporate treasurers, CFOs, and finance teams at mid-market and enterprise companies to manage cash positions, bank connectivity, payment processing, FX risk hedging, debt and investment management, and financial supply chain — enabling automated treasury operations, multi-bank cash visibility, global payment execution, FX hedging automation, and working capital optimization through Kyriba's SaaS treasury management platform with 5,000+ bank connections. Enables AI agents to manage cash position for multi-bank balance aggregation and forecasting automation, handle payment execution for global payment workflow and approval automation, access bank statement for bank statement reconciliation automation, retrieve FX exposure for currency risk identification and hedge automation, manage hedge accounting for FX derivative and accounting entry automation, handle debt management for corporate loan and credit facility automation, access investment management for short-term investment portfolio automation, retrieve intercompany for intra-company loan and netting automation, manage financial supply chain for supplier payment and dynamic discounting automation, and integrate Kyriba with ERP (SAP, Oracle), banks (SWIFT), and payment networks for treasury automation.
use_cases: Aggregating global cash positions across 5,000+ banks for corporate treasurer visibility automation agents
Automating global payment workflows and approval chains for treasury payments automation agents
Managing FX exposure and hedge execution for corporate currency risk automation agents
Reconciling bank statements with ERP accounts for treasury accounting automation agents
not_for: Small business banking (Kyriba targets mid-market and enterprise treasury, not SMB cash management)
Insurance premium financing (Kyriba is corporate treasury, not insurance-specific cash management)
Personal finance management (Kyriba is B2B corporate treasury, not consumer financial management)
best_when: A corporate treasurer, CFO, or finance team at a mid-market or enterprise company wanting AI agents to automate multi-bank cash visibility, global payment execution, FX risk management, and treasury reporting through Kyriba's cloud-native treasury management platform.
avoid_when: ERP INTEGRATION IS FOUNDATIONAL: Kyriba treasury requires ERP integration for complete data flow; automated standalone treasury assumption creates disconnected cash positions without ERP synchronization; automated must establish Kyriba-ERP (SAP/Oracle) integration before automated treasury workflows. BANK CONNECTIVITY REQUIRES ONBOARDING: Each bank connection in Kyriba requires bank-specific onboarding and testing; automated instant bank connectivity assumption creates bank_not_connected for unregistered banks; automated must complete bank connectivity onboarding per bank. FX HEDGE EXECUTION REQUIRES BANK DEALING: FX hedge trades require execution with authorized dealing banks; automated automated-FX-dealing assumption creates unauthorized_trade for FX hedges without bank dealing room involvement; automated must route FX trade execution through authorized bank dealing channels. PAYMENT APPROVAL WORKFLOWS ARE COMPANY-SPECIFIC: Payment approval rules in Kyriba reflect each company's internal controls; automated single-approver assumption creates control_bypass for payments requiring multi-level authorization; automated must implement company-specific payment approval workflow.

auth.notes: Kyriba uses OAuth2 for treasury REST API. REST API with JSON. San Diego, CA HQ (offices in Paris, NYC, London). Founded 2000. Products: Kyriba TMS, Payments Hub, FX Risk Management, Kyriba Liquidity Performance, Supply Chain Finance. 5,000+ bank connections. SWIFT connectivity. 2,500+ customers. Backed by Bridgepoint and Francisco Partners (PE). Competes with ION Treasury and Bottomline for enterprise TMS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo and POC for qualified prospects; production requires Kyriba enterprise contract
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual SaaS subscription by module and user; Payments Hub volume-based; implementation services; bank connectivity fees
pricing.notes: San Diego CA. Bridgepoint PE. Annual subscription. 2,500+ enterprise customers. Treasury market leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; payment and cash position APIs throttled per tenant plan

known_agent_gotchas: PAYMENT STATUS IS ASYNCHRONOUS: Kyriba payment execution status updates asynchronously after bank processing; automated synchronous payment confirmation assumption creates missing_bank_acknowledgment; automated must poll payment status or use webhooks for final payment confirmation

CASH POSITION REQUIRES BANK STATEMENT IMPORT: Kyriba cash positions depend on imported bank statements; automated real-time balance assumption creates stale_cash_position for banks without intraday reporting; automated must account for bank statement delivery schedule

FX RATES ARE MARKET-SOURCED: Kyriba FX exposure calculations use market rate feeds; automated static FX rate assumption creates outdated_hedge_valuation; automated must connect live FX rate sources for accurate exposure and P&L calculation

INTERCOMPANY NETTING REQUIRES ENTITY SETUP: Kyriba intercompany netting requires all legal entities configured; automated ad-hoc netting assumption creates entity_not_registered for companies without pre-configured intercompany relationships; automated must register all legal entities before intercompany netting

FOUR-EYES PRINCIPLE FOR PAYMENTS: Kyriba enforces maker-checker (four-eyes) for payment execution by default; automated single-user payment assumption creates four_eyes_required; automated must implement dual approval for payment creation and release
agent_readiness.security_notes: Corporate treasury. SOC2, SOX, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US/EU. Corporate cash, payment, and FX data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Treasury management. SOC2, SOX, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US/EU. Corporate cash and payment data.
